scope_note: QA Obstruction Stack family [115]: synthesis spine for the full [111]–[114] obstruction chain. A single cert that recomputes and asserts: (1) v_p(r)=1 → arithmetic impossible [111]; (2) impossible → control unreachable [112]; (3) unreachable → planner prunes with 0 nodes [113]; (4) pruned → saved_nodes=N, pruning_ratio=1.0 [114]. Arithmetic impossibility deterministically induces control impossibility, planner pruning, and guaranteed search-cost savings. Validator recomputes every layer independently.
